author: Epistemos asset pipeline (procedural V1)
v2_substitution_policy: When an artist refines this atlas to V2 in Aseprite, the artist works from the matching Character DNA + this V1 atlas. Their refined PNG must keep the silhouette parameters (aspect, legs, antennae, eye_treatment) doctrine-mandated by §5.1; only the pixel pattern within the silhouette changes. The artist's provenance.json must record the artist name, date, model used (if any), and a visual-diff report against this V1 atlas.
